requirements.summary: Update the footer anchor element text from current value to 'Dollars.ai'
acceptanceCriteria: The footer anchor element previously showing 'Dollars 💵' or similar text now displays 'Dollars.ai'.
The link's href and styling remain unchanged.
No other footer elements are modified.

file_operations.description: Locate the anchor element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/footer[1]/div[3]/div[2]/p[2]/a[1] within the Footer component and update its visible text content to 'Dollars.ai'. Preserve the existing href attribute and all styling/className properties. Do not modify any other footer elements, links, or layout structure.
